column1: CHUC NANG F1: CHAM DIEM BAI THI (POST /api/ai/ingest-context)

column3: 1. Gui POST /api/ai/ingest-context voi [] 2. Kiem tra trang thai va noi dung phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve 400 kem thong bao loi
column5: AI service dang chay; endpoint co the truy cap
column15: Validation bien toi thieu (danh sach rong) hoat dong dung

column2: F1 - Tu choi payload vuot 100 ban ghi
column3: 1. Gui POST /api/ai/ingest-context voi 101 ban ghi 2. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve 400 kem thong bao vuot gioi han
column5: AI service dang chay; endpoint co the truy cap
column15: Validation bien toi da cho so luong ban ghi duoc ap dung

column2: F1 - Tu choi khi thieu studentId
column3: 1. Gui POST /api/ai/ingest-context co attempt_id nhung thieu studentId 2. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve 400 kem thong bao thieu truong bat buoc
column5: AI service dang chay; endpoint co the truy cap
column15: Rang buoc truong bat buoc duoc kiem soat

column2: F1 - Chap nhan payload hop le
column3: 1. Gui POST /api/ai/ingest-context voi studentId, attempt_id, answers hop le 2. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve 202 va status = ACCEPTED
column5: AI service dang chay; endpoint co the truy cap
column15: Luong cham diem bat dong bo duoc kich hoat thanh cong

column1: CHUC NANG F2: LAY KET QUA CHAM DIEM (GET /api/ai/result/{attemptId})

column2: F2 - Tu choi getResult khi khong co token
column3: 1. Gui GET /api/ai/result/{attemptId} khong kem Authorization 2. Kiem tra phan hoi
column5: AI service dang chay; da cau hinh attemptId test
column15: Lop bao mat hoat dong dung cho endpoint ket qua

column2: F2 - Lay ket qua voi JWT
column3: 1. Gan JWT hop le 2. Gui GET /api/ai/result/{attemptId} 3. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve 200 co du lieu hoac 404 neu chua co ket qua
column15: Truy cap co xac thuc hoat dong dung

column3: 1. Gan JWT hop le 2. Gui GET /api/ai/result/-1 3. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve mot trong cac ma 400/404/500 tuy theo luong validate backend
column15: Kiem thu bien am cho attemptId

column2: F2 - attemptId khong ton tai khong duoc tra unauthorized
column3: 1. Gan JWT hop le 2. Gui GET /api/ai/result/999999999 3. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: Khong duoc la 401/403; ky vong 200 hoac 404
column15: Xac nhan da qua lop auth va vao dung nhanh nghiep vu

column1: CHUC NANG F3: LAY KET QUA CHI TIET TUNG CAU (GET /api/ai/result/{attemptId}/details)

column2: F3 - Tu choi getDetailedResult khi khong co token
column3: 1. Gui GET /api/ai/result/{attemptId}/details khong kem Authorization 2. Kiem tra phan hoi
column5: AI service dang chay; da cau hinh attemptId test
column15: Lop bao mat hoat dong dung cho endpoint chi tiet

column2: F3 - Lay chi tiet ket qua voi JWT
column3: 1. Gan JWT hop le 2. Gui GET /api/ai/result/{attemptId}/details 3. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve 200 co chi tiet tung cau hoac 404 neu khong tim thay
column15: Truy cap endpoint chi tiet co xac thuc hoat dong dung

column2: F3 - attemptId khong hop le cho endpoint chi tiet
column3: 1. Gan JWT hop le 2. Gui GET /api/ai/result/-1/details 3. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: He thong tra ve mot trong cac ma 400/404/500 tuy theo luong validate backend
column15: Kiem thu bien am cho endpoint chi tiet

column2: F3 - attemptId chi tiet khong ton tai khong duoc tra unauthorized
column3: 1. Gan JWT hop le 2. Gui GET /api/ai/result/999999999/details 3. Kiem tra phan hoi
column4: Khong duoc la 401/403; ky vong 200 hoac 404
column15: Xac nhan qua auth thanh cong va vao nhanh khong tim thay du lieu
